text.title: Agency P&L Tracker Template Core Rules

rule.statement: P&L MUST be closed monthly; quarterly or ad-hoc closes are rejected.
rule.rationale: Monthly cadence keeps actuals tight to plan; quarterly hides drift.

rule.statement: Revenue MUST be split into exactly the 3 lines: project / retainer / productised. Aggregate-only revenue is rejected.
rule.rationale: Per-line margin is the mix-shift signal.

rule.statement: Contractor fees MUST be reported under COGS, NOT under OpEx; mis-classified is rejected.
Every monthly close MUST include utilisation rate (billable / available); missing utilisation rejected.
rule.rationale: Utilisation is the leading profitability lever.

rule.statement: P&L MUST be compared to annual-plan target with variance + reason; absent comparison rejected.
rule.rationale: Without variance, P&L is bookkeeping, not management.
